creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
USE_GITHUB provides consistent mirrors and distfile naming. However, in
libevent case some files generated by autotools are not present or vice versa.

Also, package downloads are deprecated:
 https://developer.github.com/v3/repos/downloads/

$ diff -r libevent-*
Only in libevent-libevent-975498d: .gitignore
Only in libevent-2.0.21-stable: Makefile.in
